message:
fix: deduplicate tabs by tmux session at restore time (#78)

When restoring terminals from the server, deduplicate by tmux
session — keep the latest terminal per session, delete extras.
This prevents duplicate tabs that share the same tmux session
(which caused synchronized scrolling in tile mode).

Reverts tile-level dedup so all checked tabs show as tiles.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
